headline: Regional pizza chain closes final restaurant after 51 years
summary: A longtime regional pizza chain is preparing to close its final remaining restaurant, ending a business that operated for more than five decades. While national brands, including Domino's, Pizza Hut, and Papa Johns, have continued to expand their reach across the U.S. pizza market, smaller regional ...
